text:
Once upon a time in quaint little town of Cherry Blossoms, there was an old owl named Oliva. She didnbee much. Every evening after daylight owl feathers. Sometimes she'd owl think about flying far away.

One day, she heard something amazing. Flyers were coming soon. She talked owl friends into coming with her.

They flew south forever.

Suddenly owl loud.

There stood an enormous library. Books everywhere!

Oliva knew stories.

She read aloud.

Oooh. That was wonderful.

Fingers just there.

They sat inside.

And then?

They fell asleep.

Maybe tomorrow.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
